stories.headline: Political turmoil: UK will see its seventh prime minister in 10 years
stories.description: After less than two years as PM, Keir Starmer announces his resignation amid mounting pressure from own Labour Party.

stories.headline: Schools close as more than half of France under red heat alerts
stories.description: The health minister warns many citizens "will suffer", with temperatures set to peak on Monday.

stories.headline: Sir Keir Starmer: Top lawyer whose 'Mr Rules' approach failed to connect with the public
stories.description: Less than two years after he won a huge majority in the 2024 general election, Sir Keir Starmer has been forced out.
